title: AuditEvent
description: Append-only audit event record (ICD-7). Written by dashboard-api for every state-changing operator action. Never updated or deleted. All admin actions must be auditable (PRIV-006).

entity_type.description: Type of the primary entity affected.

entity_id.description: ID of the primary entity (manifest_id, campaign UUID, asset_id, or 'system').

actor.description: Operator identifier. 'operator' for MVP (no auth); will be auth subject in future.

payload.description: Event-specific context (e.g. rejection reason, previous state). Must never contain PII or image data.
